prompt: A richly detailed fantasy workshop poster in a wide cinematic composition, centered on a large hand-painted black brushstroke banner with glowing golden calligraphy reading GPTImage2Skill. The scene is a cozy magical studio inside a wooden cavern or ancient scholar’s hut, packed with warm amber lantern light, glowing UI icons, scrolls, tools, potion bottles, and framed artworks, with a distant mystical mountain landscape visible through the opening behind the banner. Arrange exactly 9 human figures total: 6 cheerful chibi mythic apprentices inspired by Journey to the West, 1 elderly master seated at center with white hair in twin buns and a long white beard, and 2 tall elegant fantasy women standing on the right side. Several faces are intentionally obscured by soft blurred rectangles. The apprentices have round expressive faces, small stocky bodies, topknots, colorful traditional outfits in purple, green, red, orange, yellow, and blue, and energetic triumphant poses as if showing off creations. The old master sits calmly in the middle, hands resting on a staff, surrounded by the children. The 2 women on the right wear ornate robes and gold accessories, one crowned, posed like mysterious patrons or spirit queens. Include exactly 8 showcased image boards or screens held by the characters: 1 herbal tea package design with Chinese-style layout and green drink imagery, 1 anime warrior character illustration with electric blue effects, 1 monochrome product sketch sheet or UI wireframe page, 1 mobile app interface mockup on a tablet, 1 luxury perfume bottle product photo, 1 small bird wildlife photograph, 1 dark fantasy landscape painting, and 1 blue analytics dashboard screen. Surround the group with exactly 7 glowing interface/sign elements: 1 code monitor in the upper left, 1 neon puzzle-piece icon, 1 neon network-node icon, 1 neon cube icon, 1 neon image-frame icon, 1 glowing sign reading “PLUGIN”, and 1 glowing sign reading “SKILL”. Add 2 illuminated floating scrolls with stylized code-like lines, one near the top right and one near the bottom center foreground. The environment should feel busy, celebratory, and handcrafted, mixing Chinese myth, generative AI creativity, game art, app design, product photography, dashboards, and illustration. Use ultra-detailed digital painting, storybook fantasy aesthetics, dramatic rim lighting, warm gold and orange highlights, teal-blue magical accents, layered depth, dense props, whimsical sparks, and a polished promotional banner look.
